rules: Do not use generic sans for headings.
Tight tracking on headings (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Subtitles and overlines must be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.

spacing_and_layout.containers: Padding must prevent text collision with borders (p-6 or p-8).
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento style for quick actions (grid-cols-2), strict modular layouts for lists.

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed bottom, h-20 or h-24, backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#06080D]/85 border-t border-white/10. pb-safe-area.
bottom_navigation.emergency_button: Prominent circular button on the left or integrated centrally. Solid red, with heavy glowing drop shadow: shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)]. Contains emergency icon (e.g., siren/shield).

sidebar.style: Slide-out from left (Shadcn Sheet). Dark frosted glass background.

header.style: Sticky top, transparent with backdrop blur. Contains Sidebar trigger (left), Title/Logo (center), and Notification Bell (top-right).

cards.style: bg-white/5 or bg-[#11141D], border border-white/10, rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl, inner shadow-sm. Subtly glowing borders on hover or focus.

emergency_module.style: Large pulsing red button centrally placed on screen. Medical/Security rapid option chips below. GPS map/coordinates card at the bottom.

cases_module.style: Pill-shaped tabs (All, Mine, Community). List of cards with status badges (neon text on tinted bg) and comment counts. Floating Action Button (FAB) for Create.

assembly_module.style: Voting cards with large touch targets. Yes/No/Abstain buttons using solid and outline styles. Attendance metrics prominently displayed.

home_dashboard.style: Greeting/Header, glassy Status Card (using abstract texture background), Quick Actions 2x2 bento grid (Casos, Finanzas, Documentos, Asamblea), Recent Activity feed.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Heavy use of backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl on navigation and modal surfaces. Optical clarity achieved with 1px white/10 inner borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows rather than hard black shadows. Drop-shadows with accent colors for active states.
visual_enhancers.icons: lucide-react with 1.5px stroke width for an elegant, outline look.
visual_enhancers.animations: Subtle Framer Motion entrances. Slide up for page transitions. Pulsing animations for emergency indicators.

media_urls.description: Dark abstract purple and blue light texture for the Home Status Card.
Luxury apartment building exterior for contextual imagery or empty states.
Profile avatar for the current user in Header/Sidebar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS extensively. Follow standard mobile-first layout rules (e.g. max-w-md mx-auto).
Implement the bottom navigation exactly with 4 items: Emergency (Red/Circular with pulsing glow), Home, Cases, Profile.
Do NOT include an 'Alerts' tab in the bottom nav. Notifications must be handled via a bell icon in the top-right of the header.
Implement the Sidebar using the Shadcn Sheet component sliding from the left, containing: Visitas, Reservas, Directorio, Documentos, Finanzas, Asamblea.
Apply rounded corners (rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl) to cards and containers.
Use deep dark blue/charcoal colors with subtle neon cyan/purple accents for a high-end SaaS feel like Linear or Stripe.
Always apply `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
